title: Foundation and Migration Guardrails
goal: Stop drift and create safety rails before migration work starts.

title: Reconcile repo identity, default branch, remotes, and contribution target
goal: Remove stale branch and repository instructions before contributors begin migration work.

title: Publish structure rules and neutralize old docs
goal: Make the domain-first structure rules override the old mechanism-first guidance.

title: Bootstrap GitHub Actions CI and add early no-new-legacy-files guardrail
goal: Create CI and block new files in frozen legacy buckets before migration starts.

title: Create backend skeleton, charters, dependency graph, and route-adapter policy
goal: Create backend destinations and define narrow charters before moving behavior.

title: Create frontend ownership skeleton
goal: Preserve React/Vite conventions while documenting domain ownership below the shell.

title: Add baseline backend route smoke tests for every registered blueprint
goal: Make route breakage visible before domain migrations move code.

title: Add baseline backend auth and permissions tests
goal: Protect identity permission and project-access behavior before refactoring policy.

title: Decide frontend baseline test path
goal: Make the frontend test/deferral decision machine-visible before frontend moves.

title: Implement baseline frontend ownership and render smoke tests if chosen
goal: Add frontend smoke coverage when NBB-108A chooses implementation over deferral.

title: Apply pre-migration correctness sweep from the taste audit
goal: Fix cheap correctness defects before structural churn moves the files.

title: Central Policy, Safety, and Shared Boundaries
goal: Front-load safety data and contract decisions needed by domain migrations.

title: Consolidate auth identity, token validation, query-token policy, and project access
goal: Create one canonical identity and project-access path.

title: Make permissions explicit and fail-closed outside dev/single-user mode
goal: Stop unknown permissions and DB failures from opening production access.

title: Create ToolCapabilityPolicy for Claude-visible tools
goal: Classify every Claude-visible tool before chat or analysis exposes it.

title: Disable or flag off unsafe raw-code analysis outside dev/single-user mode before moving analysis code
goal: Quarantine active exec-code risk before source analysis is reorganized.

title: Own Supabase migrations, RLS, storage buckets, object-path contracts, and schema contracts
goal: Make database storage and RLS contracts first-class architecture.

title: Define named cross-stack contracts
goal: Name and preserve backend/frontend wire contracts before parallel migration.

title: Define providers and connectors boundaries and dependency-direction rules
goal: Define external edge ownership without stealing domain-owned operations.

title: Add prompt and tool loader registry shims
goal: Make old and new prompt/tool asset locations load safely during migration.

title: Define prompt ownership and prompt-loader compatibility
goal: Lock prompt JSON ownership without moving prompts before loader support exists.

title: Define tool-schema ownership map
goal: Lock every static tool JSON owner and expose inventory to tool policy work.

title: Stabilize runtime config, app factory imports, env reload, and API-key validator ownership
goal: Make runtime configuration and app bootstrap safe before settings or connector-heavy migrations.

title: Inventory observability and deployment boundaries
goal: Keep deployment logging and trace behavior visible without blocking runtime config migration.

title: Move chat and message stores
goal: Move chat/message CRUD stores before chat public surface depends on them.

title: Move project store
goal: Move project CRUD store without blocking unrelated stores.

title: Move auth user and password stores
goal: Move user/password persistence under auth after canonical identity lands.

title: Move brand stores
goal: Move brand asset and config stores to brand ownership.

title: Move connector stores
goal: Move database and MCP connection stores under connector ownership.

title: Give background tasks and active-task status one owner
goal: Make task lifecycle cancellation and polling one owned subsystem.

title: Chat Domain Migration
goal: Move chat to an owned domain with explicit contracts and tool ownership.

title: Create chat public surface and lock chat contracts
goal: Create the chat import surface and preserve streaming citation and tool contracts.

title: Split main_chat_service.py by real policy and state boundaries
goal: Reduce the main chat service without creating shallow permanent wrappers.

title: Assign chat-invoked tools to owning domains and connectors
goal: Keep chat as orchestrator while domains own executable adapters.

title: Resolve chat naming collisions
goal: Prevent old ChatService style names from surviving in new paths.

title: Sources Domain Migration
goal: Move ingestion importers citations stores and analysis to source-owned homes.

title: Create source pipeline skeleton and file-format ownership map
goal: Create pipeline-shaped source destinations and avoid generic file-provider drift.

title: Move ingestion, importers, source stores, citations, and source-content helpers
goal: Give source ingestion and citations one obvious domain home.

title: Consolidate CSV, database, Freshdesk, and deep-research analysis slices
goal: Stop scattering analysis features across agents executors and tool JSON.

title: Studio Domain Migration
goal: Move studio to category-owned slices while preserving job and tool/run layers.

title: Finalize canonical studio taxonomy
goal: Lock studio categories and item names before registry mapping.

title: Build final studio item registry
goal: Map studio items to current routes stores jobs prompt/tool assets and target paths.

title: Map studio service/job/tool/run layers and status/progress contracts
goal: Document the five-file item pattern without forcing placeholder layers.

title: Pilot one registry-selected studio item
goal: Validate the studio map before migrating all categories.

title: Migrate document items
goal: Move document generators into registry-approved document homes.

title: Migrate marketing items
goal: Move marketing generators into registry-approved marketing homes.

title: Migrate design items and logo/brand support
goal: Move design generators and settle logo/brand support ownership.

title: Migrate learning media items
goal: Move learning and media generators into registry-approved homes.

title: Frontend Ownership Tightening
goal: Keep the React/Vite shell while tightening ownership below it.

title: Preserve frontend shells while tightening placement rules
goal: Document what root frontend shells mean and where feature code belongs.

title: Move feature-owned hooks providers under owning domains
goal: Stop feature hooks and providers from drifting into root buckets.

title: Tighten lib contexts API clients citations exports and logger ownership
goal: Keep lib and contexts truthful without fighting React conventions.

title: Normalize frontend domain subtrees and design-system guardrails
goal: Make chat sources and studio frontend subtrees consistently navigable.

title: Verification, Enforcement, and Cleanup
goal: Deepen tests enforce boundaries and remove migration leftovers.

title: Add chat tool contract tests
goal: Protect chat tool routing and result contracts after migration.

title: Add source citation and analysis tests
goal: Protect source citation and analysis quarantine behavior after migration.

title: Add studio job background status tests
goal: Protect studio job lifecycle progress and status behavior.

title: Add early architecture checks
goal: Enforce root and dependency-direction basics before full migration completes.

title: Add rich post-migration import-boundary checks
goal: Prevent migrated domains from regressing into old buckets or cross-domain internals.

title: Add type and AST safety checks
goal: Run pyright and AST safety checks before final cleanup deletes shims.

title: Drain auth utilities
goal: Move auth utilities after auth ownership lands.

title: Drain source utilities
goal: Move source utilities after source owners exist.

title: Drain provider and Anthropic utilities
goal: Move Claude cost token and media helpers under provider ownership.

title: Drain studio utilities
goal: Move studio export screenshot and design utilities after relevant studio owners exist.

title: Verify final utils exceptions
goal: Confirm utils contains only approved exceptions or documented rehomes.

title: Drop suffix drift, convert stateless classes, remove barrels, delete shims, update final docs
goal: Make the new structure the only current structure.
